title: Galley-La Inspects the Merry
description: The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Nami, Usopp, Zoro, Sanji. The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: are worth every penny of it.

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: These look ancient and high quality.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: We'll buy a statue with what's left!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: If you have no more question,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'll go and prepare the cash...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: I have three things to tell you...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: number three... if you lie again...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: We'll cut off your head right here!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Finally, some well-earned reward for Sky Island!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Hey, Luffy, don't swing like that...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Nami's look was super scary. Hahaha...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Anyways, everything went great so... ah!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And I'll break all your teeth!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: No need, after we find the carpenter.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey! They're selling Mizzu Mizzu Bun!!

summary: The Franky Family enters the story as Water Seven’s underworld collides with the Straw Hats’ money and the fate of the Going Merry.
